top_items.title: Google Cloud named a Leader in The Forrester Wave™: Sovereign Cloud Platforms, Q2 2026
top_items.one_liner: Google Cloud named a Leader in Sovereign Cloud Platforms by Forrester, addressing data sovereignty needs for regulated sectors.

top_items.title: Claude Mythos Preview: Available in private preview on Vertex AI
top_items.one_liner: Anthropic's Claude Mythos model is now in private preview on Google Cloud's Vertex AI.

top_items.title: Introducing Looker self-service Explores for faster ad-hoc analysis
top_items.one_liner: Looker introduces self-service Explores to accelerate ad-hoc analysis, complementing its governed data framework.
